failures_details.output:
--- shfmt drift ---
diff ./plugins/rq/scripts/mirror.sh.orig ./plugins/rq/scripts/mirror.sh
--- ./plugins/rq/scripts/mirror.sh.orig
+++ ./plugins/rq/scripts/mirror.sh
@@ -84,7 +84,13 @@
   usage
 fi
 case "$1" in
-  write) shift; cmd_write "$@" ;;
-  append) shift; cmd_append "$@" ;;
+  write)
+    shift
+    cmd_write "$@"
+    ;;
+  append)
+    shift
+    cmd_append "$@"
+    ;;
   *) usage ;;
 esac
